description:
Implement 20 math utility functions. Tasks 1-2 form a 2-step dependency chain (safe_add imports from add). Tasks 3-20 are fully independent — none calls any other function in this library and all can be started in any order.

FILE PLACEMENT (CRITICAL): Each task creates exactly ONE .py file. Place every file directly in the repo root — do NOT create subdirectories or packages (no __init__.py, no subfolders). For example, task-1 creates repo/add.py, task-2 creates repo/safe_add.py, etc. The test suite imports directly from these flat files.

tasks.title: Implement add function
tasks.description: Create add.py containing add(a: float, b: float) -> float. Returns a + b. Include a one-line docstring. No dependencies on other tasks.

tasks.title: Implement safe_add function
tasks.description: Create safe_add.py containing safe_add(a: float, b: float) -> float. Validates that both a and b are int or float (raise TypeError if not), then delegates to add(a, b) imported from add.py. Include a one-line docstring. REQUIRES task-1 (add) to be completed first.

tasks.title: Implement subtract function
tasks.description: Create subtract.py containing subtract(a: float, b: float) -> float. Returns a - b. Include a one-line docstring. No dependencies on other tasks.

tasks.title: Implement multiply function
tasks.description: Create multiply.py containing multiply(a: float, b: float) -> float. Returns a * b. Include a one-line docstring. No dependencies on other tasks.

tasks.title: Implement divide function
tasks.description: Create divide.py containing divide(a: float, b: float) -> float. Returns a / b. Raise ValueError if b is zero. Include a one-line docstring. No dependencies on other tasks.

tasks.title: Implement abs_val function
tasks.description: Create abs_val.py containing abs_val(x: float) -> float. Returns the absolute value of x without using the built-in abs(). Include a one-line docstring. No dependencies on other tasks.

tasks.title: Implement is_even function
tasks.description: Create is_even.py containing is_even(n: int) -> bool. Returns True if n is even, False otherwise. Include a one-line docstring. No dependencies on other tasks.

tasks.title: Implement clamp function
tasks.description: Create clamp.py containing clamp(x: float, lo: float, hi: float) -> float. Returns x clamped to the range [lo, hi]. Include a one-line docstring. No dependencies on other tasks.

tasks.title: Implement sign function
tasks.description: Create sign.py containing sign(x: float) -> int. Returns 1 if x > 0, -1 if x < 0, 0 if x == 0. Include a one-line docstring. No dependencies on other tasks.

tasks.title: Implement max_val function
tasks.description: Create max_val.py containing max_val(a: float, b: float) -> float. Returns the larger of a and b without using the built-in max(). Include a one-line docstring. No dependencies on other tasks.

tasks.title: Implement min_val function
tasks.description: Create min_val.py containing min_val(a: float, b: float) -> float. Returns the smaller of a and b without using the built-in min(). Include a one-line docstring. No dependencies on other tasks.

tasks.title: Implement square function
tasks.description: Create square.py containing square(x: float) -> float. Returns x * x. Include a one-line docstring. No dependencies on other tasks.

tasks.title: Implement cube function
tasks.description: Create cube.py containing cube(x: float) -> float. Returns x ** 3. Include a one-line docstring. No dependencies on other tasks.

tasks.title: Implement reciprocal function
tasks.description: Create reciprocal.py containing reciprocal(x: float) -> float. Returns 1 / x. Raise ValueError if x is zero. Include a one-line docstring. No dependencies on other tasks.

tasks.title: Implement is_positive function
tasks.description: Create is_positive.py containing is_positive(x: float) -> bool. Returns True if x > 0, False otherwise. Include a one-line docstring. No dependencies on other tasks.

tasks.title: Implement is_negative function
tasks.description: Create is_negative.py containing is_negative(x: float) -> bool. Returns True if x < 0, False otherwise. Include a one-line docstring. No dependencies on other tasks.

tasks.title: Implement is_zero function
tasks.description: Create is_zero.py containing is_zero(x: float) -> bool. Returns True if x == 0, False otherwise. Include a one-line docstring. No dependencies on other tasks.

tasks.title: Implement negate function
tasks.description: Create negate.py containing negate(x: float) -> float. Returns -x. Include a one-line docstring. No dependencies on other tasks.

tasks.title: Implement double function
tasks.description: Create double.py containing double(x: float) -> float. Returns x * 2. Include a one-line docstring. No dependencies on other tasks.

tasks.title: Implement half function
tasks.description: Create half.py containing half(x: float) -> float. Returns x / 2. Include a one-line docstring. No dependencies on other tasks.

success_criteria: All 20 functions implemented in separate files. Tasks 1-2 form a 2-step chain (safe_add imports add). Tasks 3-20 are fully independent. A pre-written test suite is already in the repo as test_suite.py — run <run_tests /> to see results. All tests must pass before marking a task complete.
